instruction:
Consider the following data set. Find the mean, median and mode(s). Record answers that are not integers to two decimal places.
NOTES: (1) If there is more than one mode, list them all, separated by commas. (2) If there is no mode, enter "None".
Data set: 5, 11, 11, 3, 3, 10, 19, 17, 7, 12, 18, 18, 16, 10, 19, 19, 5, 6, 9
Mean: [ANS]
Median: [ANS]
Mode: [ANS]
